:-
-- Offer has to be submitted basis Mid China range along with differential for North and South China
--
Auction will be conducted basis WOB
-- In case of any successful bidder not being able to perform as per the finally agreed laycan or rates, compensation in the form of Lumpsum fee or any contractual damage incurred by Charterers, whichever is higher shall be charged from owners.
Please note down the following points:
Quarantine requirements at each port prior to tendering of NOR to be met. Any deviation to be at owners time and cost.
Owners to provide the vessel last 10 port calls, crew change list for last 3 ports, PC & Health clearances from the last 2-3 ports.
Attached terms to be final and binding on the owners without any deviation.
Please quote strictly as per the enquiry terms attached
